[[File:Halloween Choice Pack Details.png|300px]]

The {{RewardIconWithLink|Halloween Choice Pack|orange}} is a reward from [[Pumpkin Lucky Night]] Oct. 25 - Oct. 31 2024.

You may choose a reward from the Pack!

* {{RewardIconWithLink|CCD, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Cellular Pathology, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Einstein's Brain, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Medium Rune, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Olympic Charter, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Voyager 1, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal Box, +2|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +4k}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
